stemHtml: Which of the following options is the correct description for wet snow?

options.a: Snow that can be compacted into a snowball and does NOT release water when squeezed.
options.b: Snow which has been compressed into a solid mass that resists further compression.
options.c: Snow that can be compacted into a snowball and releases water when squeezed.
options.d: Water-saturated snow which splatters when hit in a heel-to-toe slap-down manner.
